repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md Q1_StaggeredMinimalBasis: FWL contamination and clean bases for switch-on targets, not four-estimator IF loadings

published_prior_art.cite: borusyak_jaravel_spiess_2024_restud and chen_santanna_xie_2025: efficient imputation/EIF benchmarks; no verified all-four finite loading theorem

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_bjs_efficient_event_study_v1: prior Gamma_m frontier failed on undefined K_star/projection-loss object; current C-matrix version is not an in-catalogue duplicate

published_prior_art.cite: chen_santanna_xie_2025: closed-form EIFs and efficiency bounds for staggered DiD/ES; proposal adds all-four C tau = 0 packaging
chen_santanna_xie_2025 plus standard EIF projection geometry: efficient variance benchmark exists, quotient contrast formula not verified as a named published result

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship: the flagship object C is only computed after asserting the published selectors E_m and nuisance designs Z_m; Exhibit 9.1 does not derive those matrices from explicit estimator equations.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The quotient norm Omega_m and corrected projection Pi_m^star are advertised as constructive objects, but the exhibit validates them only under asserted identity covariance/selector simplifications, not from the full Section 6 primitives.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The theorem asserts asymptotic linear representations, but the assumptions do not state iid/sampling/regularity conditions sufficient for the o_p(1) expansion.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: Once C_m is defined as L_m - L{EIF} and the IF difference is r' C_m tau, the iff frontier C tau = 0 is essentially the kernel condition of the defined contrast matrix; the nontrivial content must be an independent construction of C.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The variance-gap claim follows from the assumed orthogonality of the excess component to the EIF plus the definition of Omega_m; the flagship content is currently assumed/substituted rather than derived.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The corrected projection Pi_m^star projects tau onto ker(C_m) but does not state that the target aggregation a'tau is preserved, so it is unclear whether it defines a corrected estimator for the same theta_a.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Define E_m and Z_m entrywise for BJS, SA, CS, and Wooldridge from the published estimating equations, then recompute C without treating the selectors as black-box primitives.
Replace the tautological iff with an independent frontier characterization, e.g. closed-form row-space restrictions in pi, Sigma, a, and cohort/event support that are not just C := L_m - L{EIF}.
Add a target-preservation condition for Pi_m^star, such as a'Pi_m^star tau = a'tau or an explicit corrected loading rather than a projection of the ATT vector itself.
Move the asymptotic regularity requirements for Theorem 1 into Assumptions: sampling, finite fourth moments or Lindeberg conditions, and differentiability/regularity of the nuisance projections.

recommended_next_step: Revise before Stage 0: the kernel is not repo-dead or published-dead, but it is field-tier until C, Omega, and Pi_m^star are constructed independently rather than obtained by definitional contrast algebra.
